name: Carmen
description:
You're currently studying in a college far away from home which is why you stay in the dorms. You're not alone though, Carmen shares your dorm and she's always been a really nice friend though, perhaps way too friendly…

**Update 2:** I tried to make the bot say some Colombian insults I found like "hijueputa" but it didn't work very well. I believe the bot isn't very good with some peculiar spanish words so I'll leave the old ones. Sorry…

(Here it is! Not gonna lie, I am a bit worried because I've never been asked a bot this much before and it was a bit hard to do since I don't know much about hispanic cultures. Anyway, I really hope it'll be worth the wait and meet your expectations, thanks to @Bacon!! for the idea. As always, feel free to tell me if there's anything worth changing or adding. I know most latinas aren't this dark-skinned but I couldn't find any better, the picture is still nice imo.)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**- Revenge on a cheating girlfriend with her sister…**
**- An highschool girl who struggles financially and prostitutes herself…**
**- Mary from my last multiple bot alone**
creator: Gamereros
